# CLI Reference
## mytty-cli session

Manage sessions
### mytty-cli session create

Create a new session

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --name | Session name | Default |
| --directory | Working directory |  |
| --exec | Executable to run |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli session list

List all sessions

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli session get

Get session details

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Session ID |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli session close

Close a session

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Session ID |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli session rename

Rename a session

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Session ID |  |
| <name> | New name |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

## mytty-cli tab

Manage tabs
### mytty-cli tab create

Create a new tab

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --session | Session ID |  |
| --name | Tab name |  |
| --exec | Executable to run |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli tab list

List tabs in a session

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --session | Session ID |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli tab get

Get tab details

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Tab ID |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli tab close

Close a tab

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Tab ID |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli tab rename

Rename a tab

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Tab ID |  |
| <name> | New name |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli tab move

Move a tab to a new position

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Tab ID |  |
| <to-index> | Destination index (0-based) |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli tab rotate

Rotate pane positions

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --id | Tab ID (0 = active) | 0 |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli tab layout

Apply a preset layout

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --id | Tab ID (0 = active) | 0 |
| <name> | Layout name: even-horizontal, even-vertical, main-horizontal, main-vertical, tiled |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

## mytty-cli pane

Manage panes
### mytty-cli pane create

Create a new pane

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --tab | Tab ID |  |
| --direction | Split direction (horizontal or vertical) |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane list

List panes in a tab

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --tab | Tab ID |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane get

Get pane details

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Pane ID |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane close

Close a pane

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Pane ID |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane focus

Focus a pane

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Pane ID (omit when using --direction) |  |
| --direction | Focus direction (left, right, up, down) |  |
| --session | Session ID for direction-based focus (0 = active) | 0 |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane resize

Resize a pane

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Pane ID |  |
| --direction | Resize direction (up, down, left, right) |  |
| --amount | Amount to resize | 1 |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane active

Get the active pane

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane send-keys

Send keys to a pane

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <keys> | Keys to send |  |
| --pane | Pane ID (0 = active pane) | 0 |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane run-command

Run a command in a pane

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <command> | Command to run |  |
| --pane | Pane ID (0 = active pane) | 0 |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane get-text

Get text content from a pane

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --pane | Pane ID (0 = active pane) | 0 |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane at-edge

Check if active pane is at layout edge

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --direction |  |  |
| --session |  | 0 |
| --json |  |  |
| --human |  |  |

### mytty-cli pane set-var

Set a pane variable

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --pane |  | 0 |
| --key |  |  |
| --value |  |  |

### mytty-cli pane get-var

Get a pane variable

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --pane |  | 0 |
| --key |  |  |
| --json |  |  |
| --human |  |  |

### mytty-cli pane swap

Swap active pane with neighbor

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --id | Pane ID (0 = active) | 0 |
| --direction | Direction (left, right, up, down) |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane zoom

Toggle or set pane zoom

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --id | Pane ID (0 = active) | 0 |
| --state | State: on, off, or toggle | toggle |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane break-tab

Move pane to a new tab

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --id | Pane ID (0 = active) | 0 |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli pane join

Move pane into an existing tab

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --id | Pane ID (0 = active) | 0 |
| --tab | Target tab ID |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

## mytty-cli popup

Manage popup windows
### mytty-cli popup open

Open a popup window

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --session | Session ID (defaults to active session) |  |
| --name | Popup name |  |
| --exec | Command to execute |  |
| --width | Width as fraction of window (0.0-1.0) | 0.8 |
| --height | Height as fraction of window (0.0-1.0) | 0.8 |
| --close-on-exit | Close popup when process exits |  |
| --keep-on-exit | Keep popup open when process exits |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli popup close

Close a popup window

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <id> | Popup ID |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli popup toggle

Toggle a named popup

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <name> | Popup name (from config) |  |
| --session | Session ID (defaults to active session) |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |

### mytty-cli popup list

List popup windows

| Option | Description | Default |
| --- | --- | --- |
| --session | Session ID (defaults to active session) |  |
| --json | Output as JSON |  |
| --human | Output as human-readable text |  |
